Ruling:
Not contested and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 36(a). Opposition by Ric-Wil, Incorporated.

The trial date of December 13, 2021 is vacated. The new trial date is January 3, 2022 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is January 14, 2022. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court.

All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the December 13, 2021 trial date.

Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than November 19, 2021. Responses to the demand are due no later than December 3, 2021. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by December 24, 2021 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, December 30, 2021 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee; Matter Not Reported (503/CML)
